productDisplayName: Nike Women As Be Strong Black Capri
description: CompositionBlack capris made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, with Dri-Fit technology, a broad elasticated waist with purple piping, embroidered nike swoosh near the left waist and Dri-Fit branding on the right at the backFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleachLine dryDo not iron or dry cleanStylish to the T, these polyester capris from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, offering a comfort fit. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
